name: Megalo Growmon (Orange)

signature_move.name: Atomic Blaster
signature_move.description: Fires beams from its chest-mounted cannons that destroy the enemy at the atomic level.

description: Current Original ⇨ Japanese A Cyborg Digimon that evolved from Data-attribute Growmon . Armed with the super-metal " Chrome Digizoid ", it also possesses anti-air capabilities with its two vernier . Its Special Move is an attack fired from both of the gunports on its chest that destroys the opponent on the atomic level ( Atomic Blaster ).
